generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a former intelligence analyst, I've seen firsthand how vital our alliances are for national security. While some argue we should go it alone, the reality is that our partners share the burden and provide critical intelligence we can't get elsewhere. In today's uncertain world, weakening these ties would leave us dangerously exposed. #StrongerTogether #NationalSecurity
